events.name: Mentioned in the Inquisition Post Mortem of Lady Isabel Vieuxpont of Appleby and Brougham and wife of Roger de Clifford.
Mentioned in the Inquisition Post Mortem of Lady Isabel Vieuxpont of Appleby and Brougham and wife of Roger de Clifford.

Henry Birchynesagh and his wife Margery acknowledged that the sixth part of the manor of Harewode was to be the right of John's wife Cicely, and rendered it to them and Ceciiy's heirs, in perpetuity, in exchange for a young sparrowhawk.
events.date: 8 June 1292 (the Octave of Holy Trinity, or the first Sunday after Pentecost in the Western Christian liturgical calendar. )

events.name: Recorded in the Close Rolls as having acknowledged that he owed William Hamelton, clerk, 20 shillings, to be levied in default of payment of his lands and chattels in Yorkshire.
The manor or township of Breightmet was passed to him and his brother-in-law, Sir Robert de Holland, by their mother-in-law Avenia.

zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas是Sir Robert Ewyas III的兒子，於1230年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。他於1259年4月13日之前與Cecily de Samlesbury結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1309年在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas是Sir Robert Ewyas III的儿子，于1230年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。他于1259年4月13日之前与Cecily de Samlesbury结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1309年在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas was born in 1230, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Robert Ewyas III. He married Cecily de Samlesbury before 13 April 1259. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1309, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas est né en 1230, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir Robert Ewyas III. Il a épousé Cecily de Samlesbury avant 13 avril 1259. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1309, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas wurde 1230 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir Robert Ewyas III geboren. Er hat vor 13. April 1259 Cecily de Samlesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1309 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas è nato il nel 1230 nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir Robert Ewyas III. Lui sposato Cecily de Samlesbury prima del 13 aprile 1259. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1309, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyasは1230年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーでSir Robert Ewyas IIIの息子として生まれた。1259年4月13日以前にCecily de Samlesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1309年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas(은)는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 Sir Robert Ewyas III의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1259년 4월 13일 이전 Cecily de Samlesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1309년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas nasceu em 1230, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir Robert Ewyas III. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Samlesbury antes 13 de abril de 1259. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1309, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas родился в 1230 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Sir Robert Ewyas III. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Samlesbury перед 13 апрель 1259 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1309 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Del Ewyas nació en 1230, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir Robert Ewyas III. Se casó con Cecily de Samlesbury antes de 13 de abril de 1259. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1309, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
